description_long: This object consists of two halves of a single slice of white sandwich bread, separated cleanly down the middle. The bread has a soft, airy interior with a fine, even crumb structure and a very light, almost white color. The crust is thin and light brown, forming a narrow border around the outer edge of each half. The surface of the bread is matte and slightly textured, with no visible seeds, flour dusting, or decorative scoring. The overall shape is rectangular with rounded top corners, typical of pre-sliced sandwich loaves. There are no visible markings, branding, or packaging present.
description: Two halves of a soft, white sandwich bread slice with a thin, light brown crust and a fine, airy interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two separated halves of the bread slice, revealing the soft, white interior and the thin crust around the edges.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the bread, with the crust forming a narrow, light brown edge.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the two halves and the fine crumb structure of the bread's interior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the thinness of the bread and the continuous crust edge.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust forms a thin, continuous, light brown border around the bread's edge, with a smooth and even texture and no visible seeds, flour, or scoring.
